Sound familiar?

Your DMs are not a filing system.

Inquiries pile up across WhatsApp, Instagram, email, and missed calls. The ones you don't answer fast enough quietly go book someone who did. That's not a follow-up problem, it's lost revenue you never see.

WhatsApp
"Hi! Do you have any openings next week?"
Unread · 2 days ago
Instagram DM
"Loved your work, what would a logo cost?"
Seen · no reply
Email
"Following up on my message from last week…"
Buried in inbox
Missed call
No voicemail. No number saved.
Gone
LOST LEAD
How it works

Scattered messages in. Booked work out.

We build the form, you share the link. Every inquiry lands in one place, ready to organize and follow up.

01 CAPTURE

A form built for your business

We design a custom inquiry form and give you a link, QR code, and embed. Customers reach out the easy way.

02 ORGANIZE

Every inquiry in one portal

New leads land in a simple pipeline. Add notes, tasks, and estimate details, and move each one through a clear workflow.

03 FOLLOW‑UP

Nothing slips through

Get notified the moment an inquiry arrives, send estimates, and schedule follow-ups, until interest turns into booked work.

Packages & pricing

Simple monthly plans, plus one-time setups.

Built for small and growing service businesses. Start with the inquiry system that captures and organizes every lead, then add follow-up marketing, a website, and more only when you need them.

Capture
$39/ month

Catch every inquiry and keep it organized.

  • Custom inquiry form built around your services
  • Share by link, QR code, embed, or social
  • Instant email alert on every inquiry
  • Your client portal and pipeline
  • Notes, tasks, estimates, and follow-up reminders
Start with Capture
Most popular
Capture + Nurture
$89/ month

Stay top of mind and turn interest into booked work.

  • Everything in Capture
  • 1 branded email campaign a month, written and sent for you
  • Automatic follow-up reminders so no lead goes cold
  • Monthly results summary
Grow my list
Full Service
$149/ month

Done for you, from capture to follow-up.

  • Everything in Capture + Nurture
  • Up to 2 campaigns a month (email or text)
  • Social inquiry monitoring across your profiles
  • Priority support
